no_agent_rule: This round strictly forbids agents/subagents; AGENTS.md is an instruction file only, not permission to launch agents.
summary: Downgrade V900 TinyV330/synthetic-token evidence and require real VGGT.forward or real Aggregator token path, SMPL-X 3D feature binding, real-token gradient/effect proof, full-scene human-main RGB point cloud, local detail gates, controls, bundles, and cleanup.
